# Calmora

> Calmora is an AI-powered mental wellness companion offering on-device mood detection, guided journaling, mindfulness exercises, CBT tools, a Soul Garden, and 24/7 crisis support. It is a wellness tool, not a medical service.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Calmora and its wellness features.
- [Features](/features): Full list of mood, journaling, mindfulness, and community tools.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free and Premium plans (₹99/mo or ₹899/yr).
- [Mood Detector](/mood): On-device facial expression mood detection with Mindo chat support.
- [Guided Journaling](/journal): Mood-aware journal prompts and minimalist editor.
- [Mindfulness](/mindfulness): Guided breathing and grounding exercises.
- [Self-Help Library](/self-help): Audio-narrated modules for anxiety, stress, sleep, and resilience.
- [Mind Puzzle](/sounds): Memory match puzzle with focus and stress analysis.
- [Crisis Support](/crisis-support): Verified Indian helplines and emergency resources.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the Calmora team.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms)
